improvement_bullets: Performed root cause analysis of production issues by utilizing SQL to analyze data and coordinate with the Production Support and Engineering teams to resolve issues, drawing on experience from optimizing relational database queries (CTEs, window functions, joins) for data reconciliation and accuracy.

Served as the primary liaison to work cross-functionally with clients and business groups to manage and rectify data exceptions, leveraging experience in standardizing organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks to ensure cross-functional alignment and a consistent 'single source of truth'.

Developed exception management tools to strengthen data quality control and produced metrics and dashboards to inform stakeholders on prioritizing resolutions, building on experience creating Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual reporting and establish robust data governance.

Wrote test cases and performed UAT to ensure issues were identified and addressed, demonstrating a proactive approach to quality assurance informed by experience transforming user feedback into production-ready code and analyzing large datasets.

Leveraged extensive SQL and Python experience to perform root cause analysis of production issues, coordinating with Engineering teams to ensure data integrity and timely resolution, aligning with the core responsibilities of an Application Support Engineer.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager at iCapital,

I am excited to submit my application for the Application Support Engineer - Associate opportunity with iCapital. I am interested in this opportunity because my passion for data integrity, robust system support, and cross-functional problem-solving directly aligns with the demands of this role.

What interests me about working for iCapital is its commitment to providing innovative solutions within the private investment space. Your approach to [something unique about the company - e.g., leveraging technology to democratize access to alternative investments] excites me because it showcases a forward-thinking mindset that I am eager to be a part of.

I believe my strong SQL expertise and proven ability to perform root cause analysis would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a meticulous and analytical mindset. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports, ingesting POS and CRM data, which eliminated repetitive data entry, saved 8 hours per week, and improved reporting accuracy for faster strategic decisions. This initiative demonstrated my ability to identify inefficiencies and implement technical solutions that enhance operational workflows and data reliability.

Ultimately, I know that the Application Support Engineer - Associate role at iCapital would allow me to bring my strong SQL and data analysis skills to the critical area of production support and root cause analysis.

Additionally, my experience as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my stakeholder communication and data governance skills. I standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks, ensuring cross-functional alignment and resulting in a consistent 'single source of truth' for all business stakeholders and a reduction in report discrepancies. This experience highlights my ability to translate complex technical findings into actionable business recommendations and manage data exceptions effectively.

I’m excited by the opportunity to use my analytical and problem-solving skills in working on production support and data exception management at iCapital. I know that my proficiency in SQL, Python, and my experience in data analysis and reporting align with what it takes to succeed in the Application Support Engineer - Associate role.

I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,
Justin Miller
